---
title: "Spanishoddata: A package for accessing and working with spanish open mobility big data"
description: "Egor Kotov, Eugeni Vidal-Tortosa, Oliva G. Cantú-Ros, Javier Burrieza-Galán, Ricardo Herranz, Tania Gullón Muñoz-Repiso, and Robin Lovelace (2026). Spanishoddata: A package for accessing and working with spanish open mobility big data. *Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science*. https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251415040"
date: "2026-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "kotov_spanishoddata_2026"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science"
doi: "10.1177/23998083251415040"
publication-url: "https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251415040"
authors:
  - "Egor Kotov"
  - "Eugeni Vidal-Tortosa"
  - "Oliva G. Cantú-Ros"
  - "Javier Burrieza-Galán"
  - "Ricardo Herranz"
  - "Tania Gullón Muñoz-Repiso"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science
**Year:** 2026

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251415040) [URL](https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251415040) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Egor Kotov, Eugeni Vidal-Tortosa, Oliva G. Cantú-Ros, Javier Burrieza-Galán, Ricardo Herranz, Tania Gullón Muñoz-Repiso, and Robin Lovelace (2026). Spanishoddata: A package for accessing and working with spanish open mobility big data. *Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science*. https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251415040

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{kotov_spanishoddata_2026,
  title = {spanishoddata: A package for accessing and working with Spanish Open Mobility Big Data},
  author = {Kotov, Egor and Vidal-Tortosa, Eugeni and Cantú-Ros, Oliva G. and Burrieza-Galán, Javier and Herranz, Ricardo and Gullón Muñoz-Repiso, Tania and Lovelace, Robin},
  date = {2026-01},
  journaltitle = {Environment and Planning B: Urban Analytics and City Science},
  issn = {2399-8083},
  doi = {10.1177/23998083251415040},
  url = {https://doi.org/10.1177/23998083251415040},
  pages = {23998083251415040},
  langid = {english}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
